name: Narrative Structure (Story Spine)
what_it_is: Structuring any communication as a story - "Once upon a time... Every day... Until one day... Because of that... Until finally... Ever since then..."
core_mechanic: Fill in each prompt. Forces you to define: status quo, disruption, consequence chain, resolution, new normal. Works for product narratives, pitches, change communications.
when_to_use: Preparing a presentation or pitch / Communicating a product vision or change / When content is right but landing flat
when_not_to_use: Internal analysis documents / When the audience needs data not story
ideaos_application: Agent 3 maps the input to the Story Spine template, identifies where the narrative breaks down or loses tension, rewrites the weakest section.
